markdown_blocks.markdown: Introduction
This page demonstrates a prose-rich content structure with multiple headings, paragraphs, and list elements. It serves as the Pattern A target for KPI revalidation experiments.
Results from paired baseline and optimized runs on this page will establish the first real context_reduction_ratio measurements for the revised KPI framework.
The content is designed to test scoped heading selectors against a page that contains only editable prose nodes, with no tables or locked structural blocks.
Scoped retrieval of a single heading section should yield a measurable context reduction compared to fetching the entire page body.
Details
Key aspects of the Pattern A experiment design:

Scoped fetch should reduce context to a single heading sectionBaseline runs use empty scope selectors for full-page fetchOptimized runs use explicit heading selectors for targeted retrievalAll nodes on this page classify as editable_prose

Context reduction ratio should be measurably positive when scoping to a single heading section on this page. The target band is 70-90% for optimized runs.

Summary

This page provides a controlled baseline for Pattern A KPI experiments. All nodes classify as editable prose, and three distinct headings serve as scope selector targets: Introduction, Details, and Summary.
